overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic neon-lit city at dusk. The player exits a covered pedestrian arcade onto a wet sidewalk alongside a busy multi-lane road, passing holographic advertisements, palm trees, and industrial buildings while approaching a distant bridge intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian arcade with holographic advertisements

events.description: exits covered arcade into open sidewalk area with visible sky

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered walkway toward the bright exit

entered.detail: overhead concrete roof structure covering the pedestrian walkway
illuminated rectangular advertisement screen displaying a face
tall vertical screen displaying animated beverage advertisements
large industrial complex with tall smokestacks and metal structures

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a covered pedestrian arcade with wet tiled pavement reflecting neon lights. A large yellow holographic advertisement glows on the left wall while a tall vertical digital billboard stands on the right. The camera walks forward toward the exit where palm trees and the open sky become visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban sidewalk alongside multi-lane arterial road

events.description: emerges from shaded arcade into open area with dusk sky and backlit buildings
futuristic vehicles with glowing lights pass by on the left side road

agents.ego_description: walking along the open sidewalk next to moving traffic, passing pedestrians

notable_agents.action: walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: metal safety railing separating the sidewalk from the vehicle lanes
tall palm trees lining the street beyond the barrier

segments.scene_description: Exiting the arcade, the scene opens into a wide urban sidewalk bathed in the blue light of dusk. The camera walks alongside a busy multi-lane road separated by a metal barrier, with futuristic cars passing by. Palm trees line the street and the industrial building with smokestacks looms larger on the right as pedestrians walk toward the camera.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk approaching bridge intersection with transit stop

events.description: futuristic bus stop shelter with illuminated benches appears on the right side

agents.ego_description: continuing along the curved sidewalk past the bus stop toward the distant bridge

entered.detail: futuristic transit shelter with glowing cyan benches and glass panels
tall vertical digital screen displaying advertisements at the bus stop
large elevated highway bridge visible in the distance ahead

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows the curved sidewalk as it passes a futuristic bus stop shelter with illuminated cyan benches on the right. The camera continues toward a large elevated bridge structure visible ahead, while the industrial building recedes into the distance on the right. Traffic continues to flow on the left as the scene opens toward the intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a confined, neon-lit pedestrian arcade out into a sprawling, dusk-shrouded urban thoroughfare. It begins under a covered walkway with wet tiled pavement reflecting the glow of a large yellow holographic advertisement and a vertical digital billboard. As the camera exits the arcade, the scene opens onto a wide sidewalk bathed in blue light, moving alongside a busy multi-lane road where futuristic cars pass behind a metal barrier and an industrial building with smokestacks looms to the right. The path then curves past a futuristic bus stop with illuminated cyan benches, while the industrial structure recedes into the distance. Finally, the camera advances toward a large elevated bridge structure as the environment expands toward a wide city intersection.
